name: ALNYLAM PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
summary: PARTI Overview Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (also referred to as Alnylam, the Company, we, our or us) is a global commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company developing novel therapeutics based on ribonucleic acid interference, or RNAi. RNAi is a naturally occurring biological pathway within cells for sequence-specific silencing and regulation of gene expression. By harnessing the RNAi pathway, we have pioneered a new class of innovative medicines, known as RNAi therapeutics. RNAi therapeutics a...
